nodes.label: Monorepo Architecture Decision
nodes.rationale: Monorepo chosen for 2-person team: avoids polyrepo operational overhead, enables shared API types/validation, supports atomic cross-app commits, simplifies CI/CD with path-based triggers.

nodes.label: Core Tech Stack (Java21 + Next.js + Flutter + PostgreSQL)
nodes.norm_label: core tech stack (java21 + next.js + flutter + postgresql)

nodes.label: Flow Line Visual System
nodes.rationale: Flow Line is the core brand metaphor connecting all work-order states (Open, Assigned, On-the-way, In-progress, Completed, SLA-risk, Offline, Synced). It must appear across multiple sections and convey real operational workflow, not decoration.

nodes.label: Multi-Tenant Strategy: Shared DB Row-Level
nodes.rationale: Shared DB / Shared Schema chosen for resource efficiency and operational simplicity. Each table has tenant_id column; Hibernate @Filter provides automatic tenant filtering.

nodes.label: Operations Control Center Direction
nodes.rationale: Selected landing direction is 'Operations Control Center': the page should feel like a live field-operation command surface showing customer requests entering, work orders created, technicians assigned, field status visible, offline sync, and report generated.
